entities.name: USAID TARGET PROJECT
entities.description: A project focused on fertilizer micro-dosing for the prosperity of small-scale farmers in the Sahel

entities.name: FERTILIZER MICRO-DOSING
entities.description: A technology for applying small, precise amounts of fertilizer to increase crop yields
